text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: It's finally time. Haha, I'm excited for this.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Lots of interesting folk are gathered today, 
I think it's going to be a fun race.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Of course. None of our training was for 
show right? What are you getting all 
tense for?

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I can't repeat what happened last time. 
Look forward to my race for me.
